message:
fix: show real cluster-create validation/server errors instead of generic "operation failed" (#3331) (#3552)

Backend: Replace hardcoded "operation failed" and "internal server error" strings
in WebSocket progress/error broadcasts with sanitizeClusterError(err) output across
all local cluster and vCluster create/delete failure paths.

Frontend: Extend friendlyErrorMessage pattern matching to also recognise kind's
specific "not a valid cluster name, cluster names must match" error format.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
